rag_rules: When AGREE reports type errors on the left side of '=>', ensure the expression resolves to a bool type or remove the invalid guarantee.
If a named thing has no type, trace the unresolved identifier on the same line and fix or remove the invalid clause.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for AGREE expressions.
Ensure AGREE scalar types are declared as int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified names.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
For output dependency contracts, write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree blocks; use eq for helper declarations and const for constants.
Comparison expressions in AGREE evaluate to bool; arithmetic expressions evaluate to int or real.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
